title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: We're climbing the water- faaaall Lllll!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh no! There's a counter- current...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Am I in... the Wano Country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, you!! Don't Damage My Ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a huge dog....!! Are these animals fighting?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I thought, this must be the Wano Country!!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
